summary: Frontend-only testing for nav changes, relock functionality, and Login Info embedded in Marketing page. All 16 test cases passed.
passed_tests: Nav sidebar: Login Info is NOT in the Info submenu - VERIFIED
Nav sidebar: Info group has Parking, Door Codes, Marketing only - VERIFIED
Nav sidebar: Notes appears between Notifications and Features - VERIFIED (order: Notifications at idx 11, Notes at idx 12, Features at idx 13)
Marketing page: 'Login Info' button exists at the bottom - VERIFIED
Marketing page: Clicking 'Login Info' button shows Login Info content - VERIFIED
Marketing page: Login Info section has sensitivity levels with lock/unlock - VERIFIED (all 3 levels visible)
Marketing page: Clicking 'Hide Login Info' hides the section - VERIFIED
Login Info (via Marketing): All three levels locked by default - VERIFIED (Unlock buttons visible for all 3 levels)
Login Info (via Marketing): Unlock with correct PIN works - VERIFIED (Level 1 with PIN 1111, Level 3 with PIN 3401)
Login Info (via Marketing): Lock button appears after unlocking a level - VERIFIED
Login Info (via Marketing): Lock button re-locks the level - VERIFIED (Unlock button reappears after clicking Lock)
Door Codes page: Admin code shows **** when locked - VERIFIED
Door Codes page: Admin code shows lock icon after unlocking - VERIFIED
Door Codes page: Clicking lock icon re-locks the admin code to **** - VERIFIED
Door Codes page: After relocking, need PIN again to view admin code - VERIFIED (PIN dialog reappears)
Button text toggles correctly: 'Login Info' <-> 'Hide Login Info' - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Set level_1 PIN to 1111 and level_2 PIN to 2222 via API during testing (PINs were not set in DB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All nav changes and relock features are working correctly. Login Info is now accessed via button on Marketing page (data-testid: marketing-login-info-toggle). The Login Info section appears below the Marketing Links when toggled. All three sensitivity levels (Low, Medium, High) are locked by default and require their respective PINs to unlock. After unlocking, a Lock button appears to re-lock the level. Door Codes page admin code also has relock functionality - after unlocking with PIN 3401, a lock icon appears next to the code. Clicking it re-locks the code to ****. Current PINs: level_1=1111, level_2=2222, level_3/shared=3401. App password: emergeontop.
